records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13151
Which son of Yashodhar holds the academic distinction 'B.A. 
Honours'?
Suryakant.
13152
Identify the sons of Suryakant in the Sultanpur branch.
Indrakant and Chandrakant.
13153
Who are the sons of Indrakant according to the Sultanpur records?
Shubham and Sangam.
13154
In the lineage of Shridhar, identify the sons of Yogadhar.
Vishnukant and Vinaykant.
13155
Who is the son of Vishnukant mentioned in the records?
Kanhaiya (alias Shri Niwas).
13156
The daughters of Vishnukant are designated by the term _____ in 
the text.
Sutech
13157
Who are the daughters of Vishnukant in the Shridhar branch?
Sharada, Manjula, Anita, Nityamaya, Sumit, Kalpana, and Sangeeta.
13158
Identify the sons of Chandrakant in the Shridhar branch.
Krishna.
13159
In the Sultanpur branch, who are the sons of Gopal?
Shridhar, Mahidhar (alias Pritinath), and Shalinath.
13160
Who is the son of Shalinath mentioned in the Gopal lineage?
Yadunath.
13161
The title _____ is used for Shridhar's son Yashodhar in the context 
of his expertise in grammar.
Vaiyaakaran
13162
In the Darihara records, who are the sons of Yadunath?
Radhakant and Nishikant.
13163
Identify the sons of Radhakant in the Darihara lineage.
Vijaykant and Ajaykant.
13164
Who is the son of Nishikant recorded in the Darihara lineage?
Abhay Kumar.
13165
In the Mander records, who are the sons of Ratna?
Jive, Jane, and Vagi.
13166
Who are the sons of Devnath in the Mander lineage?
Shrinath, Silinath, Nidhinath, and Pritinath.
13167
In the Mander Shrinath branch, identify the sons of Kamalapati.
Gopinath, Devkrishna, and Jaykrishna.
13168
The term 'Sutau' following 'Tularam Jayram' in the Jamua section 
indicates they are both _____ of Kamalapati.
Sons
13169
In the genealogical records, what is the English meaning of the 
Sanskrit relationship term 'Sut'?
Son
13170
What relationship is denoted by the term 'Suta' in the provided 
source material?
Daughter
13171
The term 'Patni' is used in the text to identify which family member? Wife
13172
In the context of the Panji records, what does the abbreviation 'Dau' 
(Dauhitra) signify?
Daughter's son
13173
Who were the four sons of Ghanaram identified in the Dharampur 
Kalabaloou lineage?
Hridayram, Hareram, Shivram, and Kalaram
13174
According to the Dharampur records, who was the son of 
Krishnaram?
Radhanath
13175
Who were the three sons of Mitrakar mentioned in the text?
Rurdhar, Lakshmidhar, and Muralidhar
13176
Who was the father of the three brothers Ramanath, Raman, and 
Premanath?
Lakshmidhar
13177
Premanath's son, mentioned in the Nalibrahveli Basaiti records, was 
named _____.
Kalikadatt
13178
Who was the father of Pushpanath (also known as Puhupnath)?
Kalikadatt
13179
Muralidhar had three daughters named Chilka, Bhaiya, and _____.
Shyamnatha
13180
Who was the father of the four brothers Gokulnath, Rajnath, 
Yadunath, and Raghunath?
Khadgamani
13181
Which son of Gokulnath is associated with the Naduwar Karmaha 
region?
Chunchunah
13182
In the Shripur Chauri lineage, who was the son of Khedan?
Hanumandatt
13183
Who were the three sons of Kantlal mentioned in the Shripur 
records?
Puhuplal, Loknath, and Preetinath
13184
Revatinath's son, associated with the Tarauni Karmaha area, was 
named _____.
Damodar
13185
Who were the sons of Pushpanath (Puhupnath) listed in the text?
Shilanath and Yashodhar
13186
Who was the father of the brothers Kaladhar and Gangadhar?
Hakru
13187
Hemdhar, the son of Kaladhar, was associated with which village?
Athiyabadi
13188
Who was the father of the five brothers identified as the sons of 
Mahinath, including Shyamal Kishor?
Radhanath
13189
The individual known as 'Khikharu' in the Sultanpur lineage is 
another name for _____.
Shyamal Kishor
13190
Who was the son of Shyamal Kishor (Khikharu)?
Ganesha
13191
In the Sultanpur Khamgada records, Somai had two sons named 
Bandhu and _____.
Kalako

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13192
Manik's sons included Dwarikanath, Bhavanlal, Govindlal, and 
_____.
Nunulal
13193
Who was the father of the brothers Mahesh and Umesh in 
Sultanpur Belwadi?
Maulai
13194
In the Dharmapur Rahua lineage, who were the two sons of 
Preetinath?
Manohar and Bhavdev
13195
Manohar's three daughters were named Ghanshyam, Menu, and 
_____.
Harinandana
13196
Who was the father of the three brothers Dhirnath, Sahebnath, and 
Hridaynath?
Mahesh
13197
Sahebnath's two sons, mentioned in the Rahua records, were named 
Chetnath and _____.
Maninath
13198
Who was the son of Mitranath (also known as Silinath)?
Durganath
13199
In the lineage of Shankardatt, who were his two sons?
Babulal and Chandramani
13200
Babulal's three sons were named Chandrabhushan, Bholanath, and 
_____.
Phanilal
13201
Who was the father of Krishnakant, a resident of Bathaili?
Umakant
13202
Ramakant's four sons were Shivshankar, Harishankar, Jatashankar, 
and _____.
Gaurishankar
13203
In the Sultanpur Madanpur lineage, who was the son of Ram 
Sundar?
Krishnakant or Vishnukant
13204
Janardan's three children mentioned at the start of the Mandar 
(Madre) section are Khetan, Bhavai, and _____.
Devnatha
13205
Who were the two sons of Narottam mentioned in the Mandar 
records?
Mahesh and Bandhu
13206
Shubhankar's son Balkrishna was associated with which village?
Deshual
13207
Mishr Raghu's five children were Das, Bachhru, Nandan, Sundar, 
and _____.
Dina
13208
Who was the father of Kirtinath in the Sultanpur Bhareshwar 
lineage?
Hari
13209
Hemnath's two sons, mentioned in the Sultanpur records, were 
Mathuranath and _____.
Dwarikanath
13210
Who was the father of the three brothers Narayandatt, Khagesh, and 
Jayanand?
Bholanath
13211
Jayanand's four sons were Tofalal, Babulal, Genalal, and _____.
Bhailal
13212
Who were the two sons of Gangaram mentioned in the Bhareshwar 
records?
Jivan and Devan
13213
Munilal's two sons were identified as Bateshnath and _____.
Chulhai
13214
Kankir's two sons, associated with Bhareshwar, were named 
Mahavir and _____.
Devchandra (Thithar)
13215
Mahavir had ten sons; name any three mentioned in the text.
Chandranand, Suryanand, and Indranand
13216
Ramanand's son, a resident of Gadhi Parsha, was named _____.
Ajay
13217
Sawalal's son, known as Umakant or Gopal, resided in which 
village?
Sahudi
13218
Who were the two sons of Lakshminath (Shrilal's son)?
Bachcha and Sudinlal
13219
Who were the four sons of Premanath in the Sultanpur Bhareshwar 
lineage?
Ramanath, Dayanath, Shaktinath, and Ajabnath
13220
Harilal's two sons in the Sultanpur Khavashpur lineage were 
Nityanand and _____.
Arjun
13221
Who were the two sons of Devrup mentioned in the Khavashpur 
records?
Vasukinath and Baidyanath
13222
According to the Madre Diha records, who was the son of 
Jagannath?
Amatuhu
13223
Vatu's son, mentioned in the Madre Diha lineage, was named 
_____.
Ranjan
13224
Who was the father of the brothers Gaurinath and Ramnath?
Jnana
13225
Harinarayan's three children in the Shripur Chauri lineage were 
Bhaiya, Hira, and _____.
Liladatta
13226
Who were the two sons of Mahadev in the Shripur records?
Harinarayan and Asharam
13227
In the lineage of Ramdev, who was the son of Bholai?
Chhatari
13228
Bholai's son Ramchandra had three daughters named Gauri, Jai, 
and _____.
Devi
13229
In the Dumariya lineage, who were the two sons of Narayanadatt?
Atmaram and Jhumaklal
13230
Atmaram's son, associated with Samauli Pali, was named _____.
Radhanath

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13231
In the Mandar (Maderai) Jagatpur lineage, who are the three sons of 
Nardeva?
Anand, Gopal and Roopa.
13232
According to the Sultanpur (Jamua) records, who are the four sons 
of Umrao?
Shyamal Kishore, Bal Kishore, Naval Kishore and Jugal Kishore.
13233
In the Sultanpur (Belwadi) lineage, Shripathi was the father of 
Vanshamani, who in turn fathered _____.
Kalidasa.
13234
Who are the two sons of Shyamal Kishore in the Sultanpur Jamua 
lineage?
Baidyanath and Singheshwar.
13235
Term: Dau (à¤¦à¥Œ)
Definition: A genealogical term signifying a daughter's son.
13236
Term: Du Dau (à¤¦à¥ à¤¦à¥Œ)
Definition: A genealogical term signifying a daughter's daughter's 
son.
13237
In the Mandar Jagatpur records, Gopal is listed as having two sons: 
Harihar and _____.
Narsingho.
13238
Who were the four sons of Umrao's son, Bal Kishore, in the Jamua 
lineage?
Dudheshwar, Devnath, Nageshwar and a third unspecified 
individual.
13239
In the Mandar lineage, what are the names of the two sons of 
Vishwambhar?
Raghunath and Parashuram.
13240
Identify the two sons of Parashuram in the Mandar lineage.
Bachnu and Nandlal.
13241
Which specific title is associated with Madhukant from the Mandar 
lineage?
Jyotishacharya (Principal).
13242
In the Mandar lineage, who are the four sons of Bachnu?
Umanath, Hemnath, Ramanath and Rajnath.
13243
What academic qualification is explicitly noted for Jaydev in the 
Mandar (Jagatpur) lineage?
B.A. Hindi Visharad.
13244
The sons of Kanhaiya in the Mandar lineage are identified as 
Chamaklal and _____.
Ravinath.
13245
In the Jamua lineage, who are the two sons of Singheshwar?
Punyanand and Subodh.
13246
Identify the professional title held by Yogananad (also known as 
Sushil) in the Mandar lineage.
Vakil (Advocate).
13247
In the Mandar Jagatpur line, who are the four sons of Chamaklal?
Jaydev, Krishnadev, Chandradev and Shyamdev.
13248
Who are the two sons of Krishnadev in the Mandar lineage?
Kalanand and Tirthanand.
13249
The sons of Chandradev in the Mandar lineage are Shaktishekhar, 
Indrashekhar and _____.
Ratnashekhar.
13250
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who were the two sons of Mishra 
Ratna?
Harmadi and Tufani.
13251
Who is the son of Tufani in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Chandidutt.
13252
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, the sons of Dukhiya are listed as 
Jhotan, Lotan, Tadu and _____.
Bulna.
13253
Which individual from the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage is the son of 
Lotan?
Dwarikanath.
13254
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the two sons of Krishnaram are 
Nenan and _____.
Hanumandatt.
13255
Who are the three sons of Bhailal mentioned in the BatchLM merge 
excerpts?
Mohit Lal, Navchit Lal and Anugrah Lal.
13256
In the Jamua lineage, who are the two sons of Gopal?
Sukumar and Umra.
13257
Who are the two sons of Shringaramani mentioned in the Jamua 
lineage?
Avadhamani and Chakramani.
13258
Identify the three sons of Panchanand (also known as Panchlal).
Jaldhar, Upendra and Dayanand.
13259
In the Mandar lineage, who are the two sons of Upendra?
Taranand and Kamlanand.
13260
Who are the two sons of Kamlanand in the Mandar lineage?
Madhav and Keshav.
13261
The sons of Kripananad in the Mandar lineage are Kishore and 
_____.
Kumod.
13262
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the two sons of 
Laxmikant?
Ravindranath and Devanarayan.
13263
Identify the two sons of Mayakant in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage. Bodhnarayan and Ajit.
13264
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who are the three sons of Baldev? Anirudh, Arjun and Sitaram.
13265
The sons of Anirudh in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage are Vinod, 
Amod and _____.
Kumod.
13266
Who are the two sons of Dharmapath in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage?
Dharmanath and Jaynath.
13267
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the four sons of 
Baidyanath?
Triloknath, Vijaynath, Phulendranath and Udaynath.
13268
Identify the two sons of Bateshwarnath in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage.
Surendra and Kushendra.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13269
What titles are associated with Surendra in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage?
Dharmashastra Karmakanda Sahityacharya.
13270
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who are the two sons of 
Surendra?
Mrityunjay and Janmejay.
13271
Who are the three sons of Yogendra (also known as Radhakant)?
Bharat, Shatrughna and Suman.
13272
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the two sons of 
Shivanand?
Bhavanand and Devanand.
13273
Identify the two sons of Bhavanand in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage.
Pramod and Pankaj.
13274
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, the sons of Nityanand (Nengdu) 
are Ramchandra and _____.
Lakshman.
13275
Who are the three sons of Virendra in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage?
Bambam, Aditya and Vikku.
13276
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who are the two sons of 
Lakshman?
Ganesh and Pradeep.
13277
Identify the two sons of Prakash in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Abhishek and Lokesh.
13278
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the six sons of 
Nrupnath's son Munshai?
Jaydev, Haridev, Vasudev, Vishnudev, Shukdev and Satyadev.
13279
Who are the two sons of Haridev in the Sultanpur Belwadi records? Jagannath and Manoj.
13280
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, identify the two sons of Vasudev. Prayag and Madhav.
13281
Who are the two sons of Vishnudev in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage?
Shambhunath and Kashinath.
13282
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the three sons of 
Shukdev (also known as Bengali)?
Narayan, Vishwanath and Kedarnath.
13283
Identify the four sons of Satyadev (also known as Bauku).
Khushinath, Mahendranath, Raghunath and Ashoknath.
13284
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who are the two sons of 
Khushinath?
Shivkumar and Phulkumar.
13285
Who are the three sons of Yashinath (also known as Khalifa)?
Manujan, Manbodh and Balbodh.
13286
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, identify the two sons of Manujan. Ramakant and Sundarkant.
13287
Who are the six sons of Ramakant in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage? Lakshmikant, Mayakant, Premkant, Jaykant, Shrikant and Hemkant.
13288
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the son of Premkant is _____.
Nishikant.
13289
Identify the four sons of Sundarkant in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage.
Fakir (Udaykant), Golok, Vishnulok and a fourth unspecified 
individual.
13290
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who are the three sons of 
Udaykant?
Gopal, Amaresh and Rupesh.
13291
Who are the three sons of Balbodh in the Sultanpur Belwadi 
lineage?
Krishnabodh, Jagdish and Avadhesh.
13292
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the sons of Krishnabodh 
(Jagdish) are Avadhesh, Niranjan and _____.
Yogendra.
13293
Identify the four sons of Jyotishacharya Madhukant in the Mandar 
lineage.
Rajesh, Ramesh, Rakesh and Sukesh.
13294
In the Mandar lineage, who are the two sons of Rajesh?
Chandan and Kundan.
13295
Who are the two sons of Vedakant in the Mandar lineage?
Anand Prakash and Om Prakash.
13296
In the Mandar lineage, identify the three sons of Umakant.
Kalikant, Kamlakant and Mayakant.
13297
Who are the two sons of Mayakant in the Mandar lineage?
Varun and Pramod.
13298
In the context of the Maithil Panji (genealogical records), what does 
the term 'Beeji' represent?
The founding ancestor or progenitor of a specific lineage.
13299
According to the text, who is the Beeji (progenitor) of the Bhanupur 
Pawan-Chob lineage?
Haridatta.
13300
Who was the first person to earn an MA in the combined Purnia 
district and served as a member of the Bihar Legislative Assembly?
Pt. Punyanand.
13301
Pt. Punyanand, a prominent figure in the lineage, lived between 
which years?
1890â€“1965.
13302
What is the name of the literary work authored by Pt. Punyanand 
mentioned in the records?
Mithila Darpan.
13303
Pt. Punyanand was noted for being an excellent scholar of which 
language?
English.
13304
The Takwal Nima (or Takwade Nima) lineage identifies _____ as 
its founding Beeji.
Haripani
13305
In the Panji system, what does the term 'Mool' refer to?
The original ancestral village or the root of a specific clan.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13306
The term _____ is used in the text to indicate the family or village 
where a daughter was married.
Dau
13307
Which two sons of Hitnath are recorded in the lineage following 
Radhanath?
Jayanand and Punyanand.
13308
Who were the two sons of Pt. Punyanand according to the records 
of the Jhanjharpur branch?
Upendra and Nagendra.
13309
In the Pawan-Chob Haridatta lineage, who were the three primary 
sons of Haridatta?
Mahadeva, Shrideva, and Harideva.
13310
Which individual is credited in the text as the founder of a Sanskrit 
Pathshala?
Chandranand (resident of Khamgada).
13311
Identify the academic qualification of Shilpa, the daughter of Sushil 
Kumar.
MCA (Master of Computer Applications).
13312
What is the profession or title of Sudarshan, the son of Ramnarayan 
(BA)?
Engineer (Abhiyanta).
13313
Who were the sons of Jagdish (BA) mentioned in the 
Jhanjharpur/Ratauli branch?
Pramod and Amod.
13314
Randhir (BA), a descendant in the lineage, is identified as holding 
what professional position?
Bank Official (Bank Padadhikari).
13315
Who was the son of Shulapani in the Takwal Nima lineage?
Shankhapani.
13316
The sons of Shankhapani's son Ratnapani were Kaviraj 
Lakshmipani and _____.
Nayadev
13317
In the Maldwad branch, who were the two sons of Shrikant?
Radhakant and Umakant.
13318
Who were the three sons of Radhakant in the Maldwad lineage?
Padmanand, Tirthanand, and Kirtyanand.
13319
Identify the two sons of Padmanand who resided in Maldwad.
Arun and Varun.
13320
Which descendant of the Maldwad branch is noted for having a 
B.Sc. degree?
Divakar.
13321
Who were the four sons of Kamlakant residing in Katahar-badi?
Rajanand, Sarvanand, Brahmanand, and Shankar.
13322
In the Sarvanand lineage, who are the two sons of Prakash?
Prince and Jiya (daughter).
13323
Who were the three sons of Uttamlal mentioned in the 
Madanpur/Pandua records?
Harikant, Mayakant, and Devikant.
13324
What academic title was held by Prabhakant, the son of Mayakant?
Vyakaranacharya (Teacher of Grammar).
13325
Pranav, the son of Prabhakant Vyakaranacharya, earned which 
degree?
B.Sc.
13326
Who were the sons of Vinod-kant (MA) in the Bharishwar branch?
Praveer Kumar, Ashutosh, and Sumit.
13327
In the Kamalpur branch, who were the four sons of Shrikant?
Shyamakant, Chandrakant, Dayakant, and Indrakant.
13328
What dual professional qualifications are listed for Sanjay, the son 
of Shyamakant (MA)?
MA and BL (Bachelor of Laws).
13329
Shravan, a son of Shyamakant, holds the degrees of MA and _____. BL
13330
Who are the four sons of Chandrakant recorded in the Tega-chhiya 
branch?
Nishikant, Gopikant, Manikant, and Rajnikant.
13331
Identify the degrees held by Indrakant, the son of Shrikant of 
Kamalpur.
MA and CL.
13332
Who were the three sons of Jaykant mentioned in the Tega-chhiya 
branch?
Shivkant, Shashikant, and Devkant.
13333
Shivkant, a descendant of Jaykant, held what traditional academic 
title?
Vyakaranacharya.
13334
Who is the BA-qualified son of Shivkant Vyakaranacharya?
Rajendra.
13335
In the Majlispur branch, who were the three sons of Navilal?
Lalitnath, Bholanath, and Phanindranath.
13336
Who were the two sons of Lalitnath in the Majlispur records?
Daranath and Teknath.
13337
The five sons of Teknath are Narayan, Surendra, Bhuvneshwar, 
Madneshwar, and _____.
Prakash
13338
In the Phanindranath lineage, who were the three sons?
Jaynath, Jagannath, and Shivnath.
13339
Who were the two sons of Jaynath residing in Phulbari?
Shambhunath and Bandhunath.
13340
Identify the four sons of Madanmohan (son of Bholanath) in the 
Bhanupur branch.
Chandranand, Shridhar, Giridhar, and Ramanand.
13341
Who were the three sons of Ramanand mentioned in the Belbari 
branch?
Yugalkishore, Kamalkishore, and Rajkishore.
13342
In the Bholanath lineage, who were the three sons of Giridhar?
Krishnakant, Jaykant, and Maheshkant (also Suresh, Naresh, and 
Umesh).
13343
Who were the sons of Parmanand (son of Chandramohan) in the 
Bhanupur lineage?
Shiv-shankar, Bhuvneshwar, and Dineshwar.
13344
In the Takwal Nima lineage, who were the three sons of Kaviraj 
Lakshmipani?
Harihar, Padmapani, and Gangadhar.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13345
According to the Takwal Nima records, who were the three sons of 
Harihar?
Narayan, Damodar, and Rama.
13346
Who were the three 'Sharma' sons of Damodar in the Takwal Nima 
lineage?
Ravisharma, Harisharma, and Lakshmisharma.
13347
Identify the two sons of Jagannath in the Harisharma lineage.
Horai and Dhirai.
13348
Who were the two sons of Sadupadhyaya Chand?
Vishnupati and Shivpati.
13349
The four sons of Shivpati are Shankar, Balbhar, Shrikanth, and 
_____.
Nilkantha
13350
Who was the son of Balbhar who held the title of Chaudhary?
Chaudhary Harinarayan.
13351
In the Takwal Nima Chaudhary line, who were the sons of 
Chaudhary Harinarayan?
Bhaiya (alias Shrikrishna), Bandhu, and Purandar.
13352
Who were the two sons of Bandhu in the Takwal Nima lineage?
Lala and Kali.
13353
Identify the two sons of Lala in the Takwal Nima branch.
Kashinath and Baidyanath.
13354
Who were the sons of Haripani's son Shulapani?
Shankhapani and Kirtipani.
13355
In the Jivkant branch, what is the name of the son of Sudhakant?
Abhishek.
13356
Who were the sons of Premkant in the Jivkant branch?
Rakesh, Vimlesh, and Kamlesh.
13357
Identify the two sons of Shravan (MA, BL) mentioned in the 
Sirsiya branch.
Shubham and Sandeep.
13358
Who was the son of Manorath in the Pawan-Chob lineage who had 
two sons named Shyam and Gena?
Saheb.
13359
The two sons of Gena were Arjun and _____.
Damodar
13360
Who was the son of Shyam mentioned in the 
Dharampur/Raghunathpur lineage?
Nand-lala.
13361
In the Haridatta lineage, who were the two sons of Gangadhar?
Gopal and Madhav.
13362
Who were the two sons of Gopal in the Haridatta branch?
